description_long: This is an electric guitar with a single-cutaway body, finished in a vibrant orange color with blue and white splatter patterns across its surface. The body features two visible pickups, a bridge, and several control knobs, likely for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is long and slender, with a dark fretboard and metallic frets, leading to a headstock with tuning pegs arranged in a single row. The hardware, including the bridge and control knobs, appears metallic and contrasts with the painted wooden body. The guitar's overall design is reminiscent of classic Les Paul-style instruments, with a solid, contoured body and ergonomic curves. The finish is glossy, giving the instrument a polished and eye-catching appearance suitable for stage or street performance.
description: A glossy, orange electric guitar with blue and white splatter patterns, metallic hardware, and a single-cutaway body. It features a dark fretboard, two pickups, and multiple control knobs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the guitar, highlighting the orange body, neck, and headstock with visible tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the face of the guitar, including the pickups, bridge, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the body contour and the arrangement of hardware on the guitar's surface.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the body and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs visible at the top.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with inline tuning pegs, no visible logo
